description: Time picker wrapping TmTimeInput with label, placeholder, clear button, and validation styling for out-of-range values.

examples.title: Time picker with seconds and constraints
examples.code:
<TmTimePicker @bind-Value="selectedTime"
              Label="Alarm"
              ShowSeconds="true"
              MinTime="@(new TimeOnly(6, 0))"
              MaxTime="@(new TimeOnly(22, 0))" />
